title: Will Cost Inflation Mar Ingersoll Rand's (IR) Q3 Earnings?
text: High raw material costs and supply-chain issues are likely to have hurt Ingersoll Rand's (IR) Q3 performance. Acquired assets are expected to have boosted the top line.

title: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Announces Deal to Acquire SPX FLOW Arm
text: Ingersoll Rand's (IR) impending acquisition of SPX FLOW's Air Treatment business is expected to yield accretive adjusted EBITDA margins to its Industrial Technologies and Services (IT&S) segment.

title: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Acquires Dosatron International for $90M
text: Ingersoll Rand's (IR) Dosatron acquisition expands its digital technology portfolio, opening up opportunities in hydroponics, horticulture and water treatment end markets.

title: Ingersoll Rand to Acquire SPX FLOW's Air Treatment Business
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, has entered into an agreement to acquire SPX FLOW's Air Treatment business for approximately $525 million. With expected revenue of approximately $180 million in 2022, the Air Treatment business is a leading manufacturer of reliable and energy efficient desiccant and refrigerated dryers, filtration systems and purifiers for dehydration in compressed air.

title: Ingersoll Rand Expands Technology into Sustainable Hydroponically-Based Agriculture with Acquisition of Dosatron International
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, has acquired Dosatron International L.L.C. and Dilution Solutions L.L.C. (collectively, “Dosatron International”) for an all-cash upfront purchase price of approximately $90 million, with additional future consideration of up to $15 million.
